name: AAV9-TRF1
summary: Preclinical shelterin-directed gene therapy used to test whether transient TRF1 expression can improve aging markers in mice.
mechanism_summary: Uses AAV9-mediated TRF1 expression to support telomere protection and capping biology without primarily lengthening median telomeres.

open_questions: Whether shelterin-directed intervention can be translated without increasing genomic-instability or cancer risk
Whether benefits are durable and tissue-selective outside the mouse study
